hero.title: Walk. Earn. Play.
hero.subtitle: Get real Web3 crypto tokens for every step you take. Invite friends, collect skins, and compete on the leaderboard — all inside Telegram.

goal.title: We Want People to Move More
goal.description: In the modern world, most of us spend too much time sitting at screens. We believe that physical activity and walking should be rewarded. Dream Step motivates you to walk more, enjoy fresh air, and stay healthy — while earning real crypto tokens for every step.

walk.title: Walk & Earn Tokens
walk.description: Every step counts. Walk in real life and receive Web3 tokens directly into your wallet.

friends.title: Invite Friends & Play Together
friends.description: Bring your friends and compete together. Earn bonus tokens for every invited user.

wheel.title: Spin the Fortune Wheel
wheel.description: Test your luck daily! Spin the wheel and win extra tokens, skins, or boosts.

level.title: Upgrade Your Level
level.description: The more you walk, the higher your level. Unlock exclusive rewards and multipliers.

bonuses.title: Buy Bonuses
bonuses.description: Spend tokens on step multipliers, shields, and special abilities to earn even faster.

skins.title: Available Skins
skins.description: Choose a unique character to accompany you on your walks. People, kids, and even pets — everyone earns tokens together!

footer.tagline: Walk more. Earn more. Live better.
